disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Quarantine over for almost all hantavirus ship passengers, crew - NST Online
updates.body_en: Quarantine over for almost all hantavirus ship passengers, crew NST Online
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮乘客及船员几乎全部解除隔离。

updates.title_en: 2 more cruise ship passengers leave Omaha quarantine after deadly hantavirus outbreak - Nebraska Examiner
updates.body_en: 2 more cruise ship passengers leave Omaha quarantine after deadly hantavirus outbreak Nebraska Examiner
updates.summary_zh: 美国内布拉斯加州奥马哈再有2名邮轮乘客解除隔离。

updates.title_en: Two more hantavirus-risk cruise passengers leave Omaha quarantine - Omaha World-Herald
updates.body_en: Two more hantavirus-risk cruise passengers leave Omaha quarantine Omaha World-Herald
updates.summary_zh: 美国奥马哈再有2名汉坦病毒风险邮轮乘客离开隔离区。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus ship passenger recounts 'huge shock' as quarantine nears end - Australian Broadcasting Corporation
updates.body_en: Hantavirus ship passenger recounts 'huge shock' as quarantine nears end Australian Broadcasting Corporation
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮乘客回忆隔离经历，隔离即将结束。

updates.title_en: RFK Jr. orders hantavirus cruise ship passenger to stay in quarantine - LiveNOW from FOX
updates.body_en: RFK Jr. orders hantavirus cruise ship passenger to stay in quarantine LiveNOW from FOX
updates.summary_zh: 美国卫生部长RFK Jr.下令汉坦病毒邮轮乘客继续隔离。

updates.title_en: Oceanwide CEO Interview: Inside the Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak - World of Cruising
updates.body_en: Oceanwide CEO Interview: Inside the Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak World of Cruising
updates.summary_zh: Oceanwide CEO接受采访，谈论致命汉坦病毒爆发。

updates.title_en: Kennedy orders American exposed to hantavirus to stay quarantined against her will, WSJ reports - Yahoo
updates.body_en: Kennedy orders American exposed to hantavirus to stay quarantined against her will, WSJ reports Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: 肯尼迪下令一名接触汉坦病毒的美国人强制隔离。

updates.title_en: Madrid's Gómez Ulla hospital discharges last hantavirus patient - Sur in English
updates.body_en: Madrid's Gómez Ulla hospital discharges last hantavirus patient Sur in English
updates.summary_zh: 马德里戈麦斯乌拉医院出院最后一名汉坦病毒患者。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cruise passenger says she’s being forced to quarantine in Nebraska - The Washington Post
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cruise passenger says she’s being forced to quarantine in Nebraska The Washington Post
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮乘客称在内布拉斯加州被强制隔离。

updates.title_en: RFK Jr. overrules experts to keep hantavirus cruise ship passenger in quarantine - AP News
updates.body_en: RFK Jr. overrules experts to keep hantavirus cruise ship passenger in quarantine AP News
updates.summary_zh: 小肯尼迪无视专家意见，维持邮轮乘客隔离。

updates.title_en: Woman exposed to hantavirus slams RFK Jr’s ‘arbitrary’ order to stay in quarantine facility - CNN
updates.body_en: Woman exposed to hantavirus slams RFK Jr’s ‘arbitrary’ order to stay in quarantine facility CNN
updates.summary_zh: 接触汉坦病毒女性抨击小肯尼迪的隔离令。

updates.title_en: RFK Jr. Orders American Exposed to Hantavirus to Stay Quarantined Against Medical Advice - WSJ
updates.body_en: RFK Jr. Orders American Exposed to Hantavirus to Stay Quarantined Against Medical Advice WSJ
updates.summary_zh: 小肯尼迪下令接触汉坦病毒者违反医疗建议隔离。

updates.title_en: RFK Jr. orders continued hantavirus quarantine of American woman despite CDC advice - The Hill
updates.body_en: RFK Jr. orders continued hantavirus quarantine of American woman despite CDC advice The Hill
updates.summary_zh: 小肯尼迪无视美国 CDC 建议，维持汉坦病毒隔离。

updates.title_en: RFK Jr. orders passenger from hantavirus-stricken cruise to remain in quarantine in Nebraska, despite CDC recommendation - CNN
updates.body_en: RFK Jr. orders passenger from hantavirus-stricken cruise to remain in quarantine in Nebraska, despite CDC recommendation CNN
updates.summary_zh: 小肯尼迪无视美国 CDC 建议，维持邮轮乘客隔离。

updates.body_en: Countries Differ On Discharge Criteria For Andes Hantavirus Patients Health Policy Watch
updates.summary_zh: 各国对安第斯汉坦病毒患者出院标准存在分歧。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Cruise Passenger Says She’s ‘Being Held Hostage’ Due to Public Health Dispute Between CDC, Florida - People.com
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Cruise Passenger Says She’s ‘Being Held Hostage’ Due to Public Health Dispute Between CDC, Florida People.com
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮乘客称因美国CDC与佛罗里达州公共卫生争议被扣留。

updates.title_en: A federal medical reviewer said she could go home. RFK Jr. said no. - Healthbeat
updates.body_en: A federal medical reviewer said she could go home. RFK Jr. said no. Healthbeat
updates.summary_zh: 联邦医学审查员同意患者回家，但RFK Jr.拒绝。

updates.title_en: Kennedy Orders Woman to Stay in Hantavirus Quarantine, Despite C.D.C. Recommendation - The New York Times
updates.body_en: Kennedy Orders Woman to Stay in Hantavirus Quarantine, Despite C.D.C. Recommendation The New York Times
updates.summary_zh: 肯尼迪无视美国CDC建议，命令女性继续汉坦病毒隔离。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus latest updates: New case in Spain takes total to 13 after cruise ship outbreak - Yahoo
updates.body_en: Hantavirus latest updates: New case in Spain takes total to 13 after cruise ship outbreak Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: 西班牙新增1例汉坦病毒，邮轮爆发后累计13例。

updates.title_en: San Quentin Rehabilitation Center suspected hantavirus case in 38-year-old male inmate ruled a false positive, officials say - ABC7 Bay Area
updates.body_en: San Quentin Rehabilitation Center suspected hantavirus case in 38-year-old male inmate ruled a false positive, officials say ABC7 Bay Area
updates.summary_zh: 圣昆廷康复中心疑似汉坦病毒病例被确认为假阳性。

updates.body_en: Twenty-one countries launch coordinated Andes virus research initiative following hantavirus outbreak World Health Organization (WHO)
